query:
INSERT INTO brainstorm_context
               (id, session_id, context_type, reference_id, display_name, content_snapshot)
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
               RETURNING id AS "id!: Uuid",
                         session_id AS "session_id!: Uuid",
                         context_type,
                         reference_id,
                         display_name,
                         content_snapshot,
                         created_at AS "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
